evidence.note: MTLD3D12Device::CheckFeatureSupport is the current runtime implementation.
Phase 4 will prove these reports without launching a game.

D3D12_FEATURE_D3D12_OPTIONS.risk: Over-reporting can push games into unimplemented render paths.

D3D12_FEATURE_D3D12_OPTIONS1.risk: Current Subnautica evidence reports wave ops but atomic64 remains unsupported.

D3D12_FEATURE_D3D12_OPTIONS11.risk: Should stay conservative unless descriptor-heap atomic64 is implemented.

D3D12_FEATURE_D3D12_OPTIONS9.risk: Should stay conservative unless atomic64 is actually implemented.

D3D12_FEATURE_FEATURE_LEVELS.risk: UE5 may reject the adapter if this disagrees with shader model or options queries.

D3D12_FEATURE_SHADER_MODEL.risk: Must be backed by actual DXIL/SM6 shader path probes before treated as native.

purpose: Keep D3D12 feature reports aligned with executable implementation reality.
